description: The chart now stacks 30 separate sub-series (each of the 6 WHO regions broken into 5 sub-groups), creating a visually overwhelming rainbow of thin, indistinguishable layers. Individual sub-series are impossible to compare across time, and the legend becomes a cluttered, nearly unreadable list of 30 entries. The sheer number of similarly-sized colored bands renders any meaningful comparison of trends within or between regions completely impossible.
